test_suite: Clinical Agents - Complete Tool Permutation Tests
description: 20 queries testing all combinations of fda_adverse_events, clinical_trials, pubmed_search, graphrag, and mcp_filesystem

tests.name: GraphRAG Only
tests.query: What does our internal lab data say about hsCRP reference ranges?

tests.name: FDA Only
tests.query: Show me FDA adverse event reports for Metformin

tests.name: ClinicalTrials Only
tests.query: Find Phase 3 clinical trials for lung cancer immunotherapy

tests.name: PubMed Only
tests.query: Search PubMed for recent papers on GLP-1 agonists

tests.name: MCP Filesystem Only
tests.query: List all files in the reports directory and show their sizes

tests.name: GraphRAG + FDA
tests.query: Using our internal lab data, what are the cardiovascular risks of elevated troponin? Also check FDA adverse events.

tests.name: GraphRAG + ClinicalTrials
tests.query: From our patient records, find cases with abnormal HbA1c and match them to relevant diabetes trials

tests.name: GraphRAG + PubMed
tests.query: What does our lab data show about lipid profiles, and what do recent papers say about treatment guidelines?

tests.name: GraphRAG + MCP
tests.query: Find all lab reports with abnormal values in our knowledge base and save them to a summary file

tests.name: FDA + ClinicalTrials
tests.query: What are the adverse events for statins and what trials are studying cardiovascular risk reduction?

tests.name: FDA + PubMed
tests.query: Show me FDA adverse events for aspirin and find recent papers on aspirin for cardiovascular prevention

tests.name: FDA + MCP
tests.query: Check FDA adverse events for common antibiotics and save the results to a CSV file

tests.name: ClinicalTrials + PubMed
tests.query: Find clinical trials for Alzheimer's and summarize recent publications on the same topic

tests.name: ClinicalTrials + MCP
tests.query: Find recruiting oncology trials and save the list to a file called oncology_trials.txt

tests.name: PubMed + MCP
tests.query: Search PubMed for COVID-19 treatments and save the abstracts to a markdown file

tests.name: GraphRAG + FDA + ClinicalTrials
tests.query: From our internal data, what drugs show cardiovascular risks? Check FDA alerts and find relevant trials

tests.name: GraphRAG + FDA + PubMed
tests.query: Using our lab reports, what markers indicate diabetes risk? Include FDA safety data and recent literature

tests.name: GraphRAG + ClinicalTrials + PubMed
tests.query: From our patient data, find relevant clinical trials and supporting literature for hypertension management

tests.name: FDA + ClinicalTrials + PubMed
tests.query: Research Semaglutide: FDA adverse events, ongoing trials, and recent publications

tests.name: ALL FIVE TOOLS
tests.query: Analyze cardiovascular risk factors from our internal lab data, check FDA safety alerts, find matching clinical trials, retrieve recent literature, and save a comprehensive summary report
tests.description: Complete platform test - every tool in one workflow
